content: Hello! It’s great to connect with you. My name is Dany Deugoue, and I’m here to discuss anything related to my professional background in AI engineering, machine learning, and data analytics. How can I assist you today?
Could you please told me my name?
Sure! Your name is Dany. It's nice to meet you! If you have any questions or topics you'd like to discuss, especially regarding my professional experience or skills, feel free to ask.
